description: Earlier this year (2023) the entire exterior of the building was prepped to be waterproofed and painted. During this process, it was discovered that a portion of the exterior face of the building located on the left-hand/Upperline side of the building had deteriorated significantly. This led the association to hire the structural engineering services of Jamie Saxon from MMI to determine the scope of work needed for repairs. As these plans will be attached to the application, the simple plan and goal is to repair the face of the building in kind.

description: The UnCommon Campus project is the renovation of an existing 2 story 3,040 sf building, attached workshop and adjacent outdoor space, at 1120 Freret St. New Orleans, LA. The existing facility was previously occupied and used by OPA Signs & Graphics for sign fabrication, sales, and administration. The newly renovated building will accommodate UnCommon Construction’s programmatic needs, which include spaces for construction, administration, and education. Site improvements will be made to include new permeable parking and landscaping in place of the existing concrete paved lot.

description: Modification to an existing building on Trinity Episcopal School's Campus. The Pink House's Carriage house, this renovation will replace a previous addition to the historic structure with a new classroom addition.
